cache-all-aditional: All caches except preferences and read notifications
cache-capacity-clear-first: Clear cache data to unlock smaller capacities.
cache-capacity-hint: Select how much local storage cache is allowed to use.
cache-expert-description: Reduces manufacturing time by up to 5% when crafting Advanced Cache Data.
cache-warning-hint: You can clear cache in Settings to free up space.
crafting-instant-hint: Item will be obtained after 1 second animation
crafting-station-long-lore: The Crafting Station within NUTA’s Natural Science Laboratory is a concealed yet perilous technological core, using quantum tuning and lattice-memory arrays to unlock encrypted containers, reconstruct communication protocols, and synthesize module clusters; in the dim light, mechanical arms and flickering datastreams intertwine, making it feel as much a research instrument as a dormant weapons factory, where knowledge itself is reshaped into the boundary between power and threat.
crafting-station-lore: This is the Crafting Station. Feed it the right commands and resources, and it will unlock containers, tune signals, even assemble entire module clusters.
execution-machine-info: You can assign agents in the Execution Machine to take over jobs that require a long neural link.
execution-machine-network-bonus-hint: Terminal User Network connected. Execution time gets an extra -{{percent}}%.
execution-power-acceleration-description: Command acceleration only shortens the remaining time of this execution plan.
execution-slot-single-plan: The execution machine can run only one plan at a time.
manufacturing-hint: Select a recipe to start manufacturing
manufacturing-precision-tool-lore: A tool used to upgrade Manufacturing Stations.
manufacturing-station-info: Manufacturing stations craft items instantly, including material cluster compression, decompression, signal tuners, and personal amplifier assembly.
molecular-assembler-long-lore: The Molecular Assembler, developed by the Molecular Research Lab of National University of Terminal Ark (NUTA), is a weapon fabrication device that fuses nanoscale molecular reconstruction with arcane energy matrices. By following a blueprint, it builds matter layer by layer, powered by memory credits that fuel both computation and energy expenditure, ultimately transforming conceptual designs into tangible armaments—shifting weapon production from traditional workshops to a system of data and resource equivalence.
molecular-assembler-lore: The Molecular Assembler, developed by NUTA, can turn blueprints and Memory into equipment—armor, weapons, even rare gear.
power-capacity-detail: Shows current power supply and total load. Time-based tasks pause when supply is insufficient.
power-plant-info: Nuclear Power Plants generate command points over time when agents are assigned.
power-plant-upgrade-core-lore: A specialized core used to upgrade Nuclear Power Plants.
power-supply-insufficient: Power capacity is insufficient. New tasks cannot start and timed tasks pause.
power-surge-description: Increases command point generation by 15% when stationed at a Nuclear Power Plant.
printing-level-low-hint: Raise your Printing Level to obtain better equipment.
resource-challenge-dungeon-lore: Deep in the core of the Lower Deck's abandoned data centers. Elite nodes are significantly increased, raising the danger while offering more abundant chip drops. Recommended for fully equipped players.
resource-dungeon-lore: Venture into the abandoned data centers of the Lower Deck to extract residual Universal Expansion Chips.
resource-dungeon-neural-sync-note: Neural sync is automatically consumed when claiming rewards, consistent with rare item mechanics.
resource-exploration-dungeon-lore: Located in the outer abandoned data centers of the Lower Deck. Enemy units scale to the player's level. Moderate danger, chip reward nodes as the main focus. Suitable for steady chip accumulation.
resource-recycling-go-chatnet-hint: Go to chat and ask whether any Terminal User Network is currently recruiting. Join one first, then come back to use Resource Recycling.
resource-recycling-info: The automatic resource recycling unit can destroy large batches of items and return materials.
resource-recycling-network-required: This feature is only available to users who have joined a Terminal User Network.
resource-recycling-not-eligible: There are currently no recyclable items in your inventory.
storage-challenge-dungeon-lore: Deep in a decommissioned server farm. Elite nodes are significantly increased, offering a chance at storage expansion cores. Recommended for fully equipped players.
storage-dungeon-lore: Slip into decommissioned data warehouses and server farms to recover storage fragments and expansion cores. Only accessible Thursday through Saturday.
storage-exploration-dungeon-lore: Located in a decommissioned data warehouse. Enemy units scale to the player's level. Moderate danger, storage fragment nodes as the main focus.
upgrade-confirm-hint: Confirm to upgrade this slot? The required materials will be consumed.
upgrade-unlock-none: The next level does not unlock any new recipes or execution plans.
upgrade-workstation-confirm: Spend 1 Terminal Signal Amplifier to upgrade the Super Terminal. Continue?
workstation-contact-center-section: Contact Centers - Obtain clues every 4 hours; upgrades reduce cooldown
workstation-init-required: Initialize the Agent Workstation before editing this option.
workstation-manufacturing-station-sectio: Manufacturing Stations - Craft materials for orders
workstation-power-plant-section: Nuclear Power Plant - Provides global power capacity; assigned agents generate command points
workstation-rest-room-section: Agent Rest Rooms - Restore agent mood
workstation-super-terminal-section: Super Terminal - Stationed agents buff all other agents
affix-guide-exceeds-limit: Total modifying solvents used exceeds this rarity's affix slot limit.
